channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Simona Halep withdraws from Australian Open qualifying because of knee and shoulder pain
item.description: Two-time Grand Slam champion Simona Halep has pulled out of Australian Open qualifying and a tuneup tournament in Auckland, New Zealand, because of pain in her knee and shoulder.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Every team Detroit Lions could face in their first playoff game
item.description: The Detroit Lions don't know their playoff seed just yet, but either way, there are several teams they could end up playing in their first matchup. Here's the full list and how each can happen.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Lamar Jackson breaks NFL QB rushing record, accounts for 3 TDs in Ravens' 31-2 romp over Texans
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Lamar Jackson broke the NFL career rushing record for quarterbacks in the Baltimore Ravens' victory over the Houston Texans on Wednesday. A highlight came when Jackson dashed 48 yards for a touchdown on a run where he reached a career-best top speed of 21.25 mph.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Embiid shakes off pregame fall, leads Sixers to 118-114 win over Celtics
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Joel Embiid popped up from a pregame fall and scored 27 points with nine rebounds, making 4 of 5 from 3-point range and sinking a pair of free throws with 3 seconds left to turn back Boston’s final rally and lead the Philadelphia 76ers to a 118-114 victory on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jackson breaks Vick's NFL rushing record for QBs in Ravens' rout over Texans
item.description: Baltimore’s Lamar Jackson passed Michael Vick for the most yards rushing by a quarterback in NFL history in a 31-2 win over the Houston Texans in Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Knicks' Mikal Bridges outduels Spurs' Victor Wembanyama; Knicks hold on for narrow victory
item.description: The New York Knicks held on for a 117-114 win over the San Antonio Spurs Christmas Day as Mikal Bridges scored 41 points and outdueled Victor Wembanyama.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bridges scores season-high 41, Knicks withstand Wembanyama's monster Christmas debut to edge Spurs
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Mikal Bridges scored a season-high 41 points, and the New York Knicks overcame 42 from Victor Wembanyama in a monster Christmas debut to edge the San Antonio Spurs 117-114 on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles Hall of Famer Bill Bergey dies at 79 after lengthy health battle
item.description: On Christmas morning, Bill's son, Jake Bergey, posted the news of his father's passing on social media and described his dad as an "out right great person.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ravens-Steelers draws over 15 million viewers as NFL gains bigger audience over CFP games
item.description: The NFL and college football both had games airing during the same time last Saturday, and the NFL won the ratings war in a rare clash between the two.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Cal QB Mendoza lands at Indiana in transfer portal: reports
item.description: Mendoza, one of the top quarterbacks available in the transfer portal, will join a team that made the College Football Playoff after a remarkable turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Boise State's legacy includes winning coaches and championship moments
item.description: Former Boise State coach Chris Petersen still gets asked about the Fiesta Bowl victory over Oklahoma on the first day of 2007. That game had everything.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: NFL on Netflix: Christmas Day games are a 1st for streaming giant
item.description: Netflix will have one of its biggest days Wednesday since the site launched in 1998 when it airs two NFL games for the first time. “NFL Christmas Gameday on Netflix” begins with a two-hour pregame show at 11 a.m., before Pittsburgh hosts Kansas City. Baltimore faces Houston in the second game.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eight new WNBA coaches now in place. In 2025, 7 women and 6 men will be in charge on the bench
item.description: The WNBA now has all of its head coaching spots filled after there were eight open positions this offseason. Dallas named Chris Koclanes as its head coach on Monday and then an hour later Washington hired Sydney Johnson as its new head, rounding out the seven hirings.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tales from the tour in a year filled with medals and tears and a few digs
item.description: Scottie Scheffler won a lot of tournaments and had to do a lot of talking this year. One theme stood out even as Scheffler was dominating his competition by winning nine times. The answer could be found on a white board in Paris.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks drop 2nd straight on road trip in 4-3 loss to Wild
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Brock Faber snapped a tie in the third period, and the Minnesota Wild stopped a four-game losing streak by edging the Blackhawks, 4-3, on Monday night. Kirill Kaprizov, Jared Spurgeon and Marcus Foligno also scored for Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Panthers Tkachuk helped off the ice after collision with Tampa Bay's Kucherov
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk had to be helped off the ice and taken to the locker room following a collision with Tampa Bay's Nikita Kucherov during Monday night's game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Danny DeVito recalls spilling Coke on floor while attending Blazers game in 1975
item.description: Beloved Hollywood celebrity Danny DeVito appeared on former NFL wide receiver Julian Edelman’s podcast “Games with Names” on Dec. 3, where he shared a story about a night out in Portland with Jack Nicholson while the actors were filming “One Flew Over the Cuckoo’s Nest” in January of 1975.
item.dc:creator: John Ross Ferrara, NewsNation

item.title: Cowboys beat Tampa Bay 26-24 as Baker Mayfield and the Bucs lose control of their playoff fate
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Baker Mayfield came home to Texas looking to keep his Tampa Bay Buccaneers on track for the playoffs. Instead, they'll need some help.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah blows 3-goal lead in shootout loss to Anaheim
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Robby Fabbri scored twice, and the Anaheim Ducks rallied from down three goals to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-4 in a shootout at Delta Center on Sunday. “I think we just didn't stray away from our game,” said Fabbri.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Tigers Grant Lewis and Will Weirath shine under varsity spotlight
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Grant Lewis and Will Weirath aren’t your average freshmen. They’re not just competing with older, more experienced players — they’re excelling. Their combined 25-point performance in the Tigers’ recent win highlights their remarkable season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Tiger's son makes the ace. Bernhard Langer makes the winning putt in playoff over Woods at PNC
item.description: Tiger Woods never had so much fun losing in a playoff. For the 67-year-old Bernhard Langer, it never gets old winning the PNC Championship with his son.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: Jessie Bates and Matthew Judon each had a pick-6 to carry Atlanta (8-7) to its second straight win after a four-game losing streak put its postseason hopes in jeopardy.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What to know for the Mizzou-Illinois Braggin' Rights game and how to watch
item.description: It's almost time for another Braggin' Rights matchup between two cross-state college basketball rivals: The Missouri Tigers and Illinois Fighting Illini.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Ryans, WGN 9
